creator: tony@git-pull.com
text:
This is a pesky one. 

It even goes so far as to make it so I can't use the X environment outside.

I am using i3 (tiled wm). I do notice this starts happening when i move my mouse outside the VM and use the Ctrl key.

See earlier thread:

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-emulation/2014-February/011306.html


$ freebsd-version -ku; uname -apKU                                                                  
10.1-RELEASE-p14
10.1-RELEASE-p14
FreeBSD z600 10.1-RELEASE-p14 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p14 #14: Tue Jul 14 14:26:13 CDT 2015     root@z600:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/MYKERNEL  amd64 amd64 1001000 1001000
